metadata.notes: All four documentation deliverables produced from source artifacts: OpenAPI spec, implementation-notes, ADR-005/006/007, security-review-final-2, and DevOps P1 handoff. API reference covers the full BalanceDashboardResponse schema, all error responses (401/403/429/503), balance-as-string rationale, idempotency, cache behavior (X-Cache / Cache-Control), and security notes (no PII in URL, audit metadata-only). CHANGELOG documents all Added items (US-BC-001..005, Resilience4j, Redis TTL cache, Kafka audit, IDOR pattern, design tokens, PII masking, CI skeleton), Security section (CWE-532 F-1+F-2 resolved), and Known Limitations (BC-DEBT-002, C-1, stale fallback, event-driven cache, FIXED_DEPOSIT accrued interest, smoke tests, DAST). Developer guide covers prerequisites, local run instructions, all key env vars from DevOps P1 Helm values, test commands (unit+integration, ArchUnit, Angular, audit contract), design token workflow, Security C-2/C-3/C-4 constraints summary, and troubleshooting section. ADR index covers all 7 ADRs (SA-001..004, TL-005..007) with decision summaries, status, owner, and file paths.
metadata.next_agent: banking-devops P2 (after banking-qa P2 also completes)
